title: lithocarpus moluccus
intro: Lithocarpus moluccus, also known as the Moluccan Lithocarpus, is a plant species that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus moluccus include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Lithocarpus moluccus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal and health benefits.
